VUB–Leeds Algebra School (2026)

8–12 June 2026 • Brussels, Belgium

Organised within the topYB International Joint Research Group (IJRG).

TopYB | Overview | Registration | Poster session | Programme | Location & Travel | Organisers

Registration

Registration is free for participants affiliated with VUB and EUR 50 for others. The fee will be used to partially cover coffee breaks and lunches.

Participants affiliated with VUB should register here. All other participants are required to pay a registration fee of EUR 50 and register here.

Questions?

Contact: Leandro Vendramin (VUB) • Ilaria Colazzo (Leeds)

Sponsors

Vrije Universiteit Brussel (VUB) • University of Leeds • De Gruyter Brill • Vlaamse overheid
